disclosure_label: Northset contributed this fix and ran its declared checks. Contributor self-run. Not maintainer verification.

repo_policy_snapshot.ai_policy_summary: No explicit AI-contribution policy found (no AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, or GEMINI.md; README and Code of Conduct checked 2026-07-12). CONTRIBUTING.md requires a Google Contributor License Agreement (cla.developers.google.com) and PR review. CI gates on pull_request: npm run build + npm run test (node 22.x and 24.x), eslint (npm run lint), and prettier --check (npm run format:check).

limitations: Contributor self-run record of Northset's own contribution; not the maintainer's verification.

The declared network-off check runs the workspace-search plugin's Mocha unit suite (17 tests including the new button-type regression test) on Node 22, after a disclosed online phase-A install (npm ci + the plugin's build, npm cache redirected to /workspace/.npmcache). It does not run the full monorepo test/lint/format matrix; upstream CI additionally runs Node 22 and 24, eslint, and prettier --check across all packages.
